reviews.review_description: good updates. Something not working but it's fine

It's really fun and all but one thing you need us for the guns to be better and needs to have a better look so guns need to look better and function better also theitlr needs to be maps and the enemies should look better and as the waves go on it should get harder right now the only thing that is hard is aming and shooting the enemy.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for trying out the game! It's pretty basic right now, but I'll be working on some extra features and maps over the next few months. I appreciate your input!
